name: codex-flows
description: Codex-native turn automation, agent operation, SSH workspace orchestration, and dashboard proxy guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Run turn automation and operate Codex-native agents.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows provides Codex guidance for plugin-native turn automation, local and SSH stdio agents, optional dashboard proxy use, workspace delegation, local MCP delegation tools, and passive workspace lifecycle hooks. This plugin installs the Codex-facing guidance and hook surfaces directly from the Git repository.
defaultPrompt: Author a turn automation script that can skip or start a Codex turn.
Check the local Codex workspace agent.
Discover my Codex App remote connections and run codex-flows over SSH.
Run codex-flows against a remote Codex workspace over SSH.
Build a local dashboard proxy for a remote workspace over SSH.
